stemHtml: How does the centre of pressure (CP) move as an aeroplane accelerates past MCRIT and enters the transonic speed range?

options.a: It moves from 25% to 50% of the chord.
options.b: It moves from 50% to 25% of the chord.
options.d: It moves further aft, increasing the intensity of the shockwave on the lower side of the wing.
